articles.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
articles.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.

articles.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
articles.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.

articles.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
articles.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

articles.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
articles.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.

articles.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
articles.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

articles.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
articles.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
